sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101200" key="suo/brwtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῠό-βρωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n101200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bitten by a wild boar</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.4</biblScope> </bibl> tit.</sense> </entryFree>
